name: enabled
description: Enable or disable the ArchaeoLines plugin.

name: flagShowEquinox
description: Show or hide the Equinox line (Celestial Equator).

name: flagShowSolstices
description: Show or hide the Solstice lines (Summer and Winter).

name: flagShowCrossquarters
description: Show or hide the Cross-quarter day lines (days midway between solstices and equinoxes).

name: flagShowMajorStandstills
description: Show or hide the Major Lunar Standstill lines.
example:
// Show major lunar standstill lines
core.setStelProperty("ArchaeoLines.flagShowMajorStandstills", true);

name: flagShowMinorStandstills
description: Show or hide the Minor Lunar Standstill lines.
example:
// Show minor lunar standstill lines
core.setStelProperty("ArchaeoLines.flagShowMinorStandstills", true);

name: flagShowPolarCircles
description: Show or hide the Polar Circles (Arctic and Antarctic).

name: flagShowZenithPassage
description: Show or hide the Zenith Passage line (the declination line that passes through the zenith at the observer's latitude).

name: flagShowNadirPassage
description: Show or hide the Nadir Passage line.

name: flagShowSelectedObject
description: Show or hide the declination line of the currently selected object.
example:
// Show selected object's declination line
core.setStelProperty("ArchaeoLines.flagShowSelectedObject", true);

name: flagShowSelectedObjectAzimuth
description: Show or hide the azimuth line of the currently selected object.
example:
// Show selected object's azimuth line
core.setStelProperty("ArchaeoLines.flagShowSelectedObjectAzimuth", true);

name: flagShowSelectedObjectHourAngle
description: Show or hide the hour angle line of the currently selected object.
example:
// Show selected object's hour angle line
core.setStelProperty("ArchaeoLines.flagShowSelectedObjectHourAngle", true);

name: flagShowCurrentSun
description: Show or hide the current declination line of the Sun.
example:
// Show Sun's current declination line
core.setStelProperty("ArchaeoLines.flagShowCurrentSun", true);

name: flagShowCurrentMoon
description: Show or hide the current declination line of the Moon.
example:
// Show Moon's current declination line
core.setStelProperty("ArchaeoLines.flagShowCurrentMoon", true);

name: flagShowGeographicLocation1
description: Show or hide the azimuth line pointing to the first geographic location (e.g., Mecca).

name: flagShowGeographicLocation2
description: Show or hide the azimuth line pointing to the second geographic location (e.g., Jerusalem).
example:
// Show direction to second location
core.setStelProperty("ArchaeoLines.flagShowGeographicLocation2", true);

name: geographicLocation1Longitude
description: Longitude (in degrees) for the first geographic location.

name: geographicLocation1Latitude
description: Latitude (in degrees) for the first geographic location.

name: geographicLocation1Label
description: Label text displayed for the first geographic location line.

name: flagShowCustomAzimuth1
description: Show or hide the first custom azimuth line.

name: customAzimuth1
description: Angle in degrees for the first custom azimuth line (measured from North towards East).

name: customAzimuth1Label
description: Label text for the first custom azimuth line.

name: flagShowCustomAltitude1
description: Show or hide the first custom altitude line (circle of constant altitude).

name: customAltitude1
description: Altitude angle in degrees for the first custom altitude line.

name: flagShowCustomDeclination1
description: Show or hide the first custom declination line.

name: customDeclination1
description: Declination angle in degrees for the first custom declination line.

name: equinoxColor
description: Color of the Equinox line. To set: use ArchaeoLines.setEquinoxColor(). To read: use core.getStelProperty().

name: solsticesColor
description: Color of the Solstice lines.

name: currentSunColor
description: Color of the Sun's current declination line.

name: lineWidth
description: Width of all ArchaeoLines in pixels (default: 1, range: 1-8).
example:
// Increase line thickness for better visibility
core.setStelProperty("ArchaeoLines.lineWidth", 3);

name: enableArchaeoLines
description: Enables or disables the ArchaeoLines plugin. Equivalent to setting the 'enabled' property.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to enable, false to disable

name: showCurrentPlanetNamed
description: Selects which planet's current declination line to display.

name: setEquinoxColor
description: Sets the color of the Equinox line. Use core.vec3f(r, g, b) to create the color vector.

name: setSolsticesColor
description: Sets the color of the Solstice lines.

name: setCurrentSunColor
description: Sets the color of the Sun's current declination line.
